cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out which penguin is the oldest after the changes. First, let me look at the original data. The table has penguins with their ages. So initially, the penguins are Louis (7), Bernard (5), Vincent (9), and Gwen (8). Then they added James who is 12, and deleted Bernard. So after adding James and removing Bernard, the remaining penguins are Louis (7), Vincent (9), Gwen (8),
